problem id: f3ebf8bc
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND SHL(3)) XOR ROT(3)

examples:
  10111010 -> 10000101
  01101100 -> 00100011
  00100110 -> 00110001
  00111100 -> 10000001
  10111001 -> 10001101
  10010100 -> 10000100
  10100101 -> 00100101
  00100000 -> 00000001
  11010111 -> 00010110
  10011001 -> 11001100

query: 01101101
predicted answer: 00100011
